name: dollarcast
description: $cast weather-market intelligence for Kalshi Climate markets

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w packages/ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/ui && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/web
